questions: How should we measure marketing effectiveness?
What metrics and methods link marketing to business outcomes?
qa.answer: Measure both leading and lagging indicators across the funnel and tie them to financial outcomes. Use metrics like CAC, CLV, ROAS/ROMI, conversion rates, and retention, supported by experiments and models to quantify incrementality.
implication: Define KPI ladders by stage; align to revenue and margin goals.
Pair controlled tests with attribution/MMM to validate impact.
Instrument reliable data capture and governance to ensure trust.
